articles.title: ‘Scared s–tless’: Republicans brace for Trump’s primetime speech - Politico
articles.description: Rehashing grievances about the 2020 election could motivate the Republican base and press GOP lawmakers to pass the SAVE America Act.
articles.content: I have no idea what the president will talk about tomorrow night, and nobody does because he hasnt talked yet. Am I concerned about election integrity? Yes. Do I think that we should pass voter ID in… [+2459 chars]

articles.title: US expands strikes into northern Iran and disables ship trying to run blockade - AP News
